## How Has This Been Tested?

Select all that apply:

### General Checks

- [ ] Checked affected files manually
- [ ] Checked for formatting or spelling issues
- [ ] Updated or added documentation if needed

### Dashboard / Code Checks

- [ ] Ran the dashboard locally using `shiny::runApp(".")`
- [ ] Checked affected UI page manually
- [ ] Tested normal input case
- [ ] Tested invalid / edge input case
- [ ] Checked R console for errors

### Documentation / Workflow Checks

- [ ] Checked Markdown formatting
- [ ] Verified new documentation is in the correct folder
- [ ] Verified GitHub templates are in the correct `.github/` location
- [ ] Confirmed setup instructions match the tested local deployment process

## Screenshots

Add screenshots if the change affects the UI.

## Risk Level

Choose one:

- Low - Documentation, template, or minor UI/text change; unlikely to affect dashboard functionality
- Medium - Changes one feature or page; requires targeted testing
- High - Changes core data processing, app structure, or multiple workflows; requires full regression testing

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to?
